sourceMovie.title: Quiz Show
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Quiz Show works as a history movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The history and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Just Mercy
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Quiz Show clicked for you, Just Mercy (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in history and drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Quiz Show?
faq.answer: Try Just Mercy, On the Basis of Sex, Good Night, and Good Luck.—each shares DNA with Quiz Show while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Quiz Show?
faq.answer: Quiz Show (1994) is best described as History, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Quiz Show worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this history lane.
